controls.forceH264: Phoqa i-H.264 (ukuhambisana okuphezulu, ikhwalithi ephansi ngale sayizi)

convert.refineNote: Ukudlula kokuqala kweqe okuhlosiwe. Iphinda ikhode futhi ukuze ithole ukunemba.

dropzone.prompt: Beka ividiyo lapha, noma chofoza ukuze ukhethe eyodwa

errors.shareFailed: Kuhluleke ukuthola ividiyo eyabelwe ({{message}}). Zama ukukhetha ifayela ngokuqondile esikhundleni salokho.
errors.shareNeverArrived: Ividiyo eyabelwe ayizange ifike kusistimu. Zama ukukhetha ifayela ngokuqondile esikhundleni salokho.
errors.shareTimeout: Kuyekwe ukulinda ividiyo eyabelwe. Zama ukukhetha ifayela ngokuqondile esikhundleni salokho.

footer.note: Ukufaka ikhodi kwenzeka nge-WebCodecs, ngokusebenzisa i-ffmpeg fallback lapho ingasekelwe.

privacy.clean: Awekho ama-akhawunti, akukho ukuhlaziya, awekho amakhukhi.
privacy.installable: Ingafakwa njengohlelo lokusebenza, isebenza ungaxhumekile ku-inthanethi.
privacy.local: Ifayela lakho alishiyi le divayisi neze.

tagline: Inciphisa ividiyo ibe usayizi owudingayo, khona kanye kudivayisi yakho.
